creator: sten@blinkenlights.nl
text:
On Wed, 6 Aug 2008, Greg Larkin wrote:

> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
>
> Hi Sten,
>
> I have reviewed your PR and made some slight changes to your patch:
>
> - - Removed unused PLIST_SUB from Makefile
> - - Added pkg-deinstall file to advise how to remove user/group  permanently
>
> My patch diffed vs. your patch can be found at:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~glarkin/diffs/powerdns-recursor-vs-submitted.diff
>
> If that looks OK to you, I'll go ahead and commit the changes and close
> the PR.

Sure, that looks great. Thanks for the thorough review.

-- 
Sten Spans

"There is a crack in everything, that's how the light gets in."
Leonard Cohen - Anthem
